name: rootlens-source-to-kg-draft
title: brainstorm: RootLens source to KG draft generation
description: Add a source-to-KG draft endpoint and UI foundation for source-grounded candidate edge generation without treating generated triples as ground truth.
creator: elebirds
notes: Added heuristic source-to-KG candidate draft endpoint, frontend Source-to-KG form, smoke coverage, tests, and documentation. Generated rows are review-only and not written to KG CSV files.
